Discover a land where ancient Marapu tra: Discover a land where ancient Marapu traditions live in perfect harmony with pristine beaches and endless savannas. The true spirit of Eastern Indonesia awaits.
Sumba is not just a destination; it is a: Sumba is not just a destination; it is a profound journey into the past. Twice the size of Bali, yet profoundly untouched, this island is the final frontier of the ancient Marapu religion.
From the dramatic coastal cliffs of the: From the dramatic coastal cliffs of the southwest to the sweeping golden savannas of the east, Sumba offers an unparalleled adventure. Here, megalithic tombs stand proudly in the center of traditional villages, and majestic wild horses roam free across the hills.
